title: 9 Herbal Teas For Itchy Skin
description: Melissa officinalis teas contains rosmarinic acid, apigenin, and linalool as its bioactive constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe itchy skin. The antiseptic properties of rosmarinic acid and linalool work together to reduce redness and inflammation, while apigenin helps to calm the skin. The anti-inflammatory effects of Melissa officinalis teas also help to reduce itching by reducing the production of histamine, a chemical t...
